activated: Convention frozen: dense S(-r) broad-x; bosonic prepare +r / postselect -r; L_code = sqrt(2) L at coupling boundary only; kernel g_code(q) = sqrt(2) g(sqrt(2) q); explicit_overlap retained as coordinate-equivalence fixture. Downstream Gate-B work (coeff-backend adjudication, retuning-grid registration, finite-map suite) may proceed.
note: 12/12 pre-registered automated criteria pass. Auditor patch rerouted criteria 1 and 3 through implementation paths (code_l_terms, _conditional_displacement_alpha) before this recording.

activated: Validated finite-map claim at the selected moderate-squeezing parameters (one pre-registered bounded retuning pass, objective fixed-alpha rel_frobenius_error). D=8 pre-registered boundary by frozen priority rule: dirichlet. Gate-C breadth/scaling/snap work (Job 4) may proceed. Oracle global-phase gauge convention <target|prepared> > 0 is part of the finite-map definition.
note: All three boundaries pass Narrow; neumann reaches Green. First production run exposed an LE global-phase (-1) synthesis gauge gap invisible to conditional fidelity; fixed via align_oracle_global_phase + readout-boundary gauge factor before this recording.

Selection domain extended from the 81-point registered grid to a coarse dense grid (8+ pts/axis) after the dense landscape showed the registered winners at the box edge; one shared operating point (1.6, 0.25, 0.5, 32) adopted for all boundaries, weighing worst-boundary eps_F together with postselection probability; no refinement pass. Evaluator unchanged (243/243 registered points reproduce bitwise). v2 artifacts in results_revision_v2/. Landscape CSVs were extended on 2026-07-21 with a raw_artifact provenance column (rule-12 audit fix); metric values are bitwise unchanged. The evidence hashes refer to the current extended files; evidence_at_selection records the pre-extension bytes used for the selection decision (retained in git history).

The frozen heat_2d_4x4 breadth row (exact finite map plus a single circuit-level anchor at basis input 5) is extended by a full 16-column circuit-level map reconstruction at the same shared operating point (make_2d_circuit.py, run from workdir_2d/ with frozen seeds; total circuit wall time 132.9 s). Gates: per-input dense product-formula wiring crosscheck max 1.407e-13 against the 1e-8 bound; anchor continuity exact to all printed digits (eps_t_2d 3.552982606303818e-4, relative 2.6103688480868586e-3); per-input postselection probabilities within 0.649 percent relative of the frozen exact-map values; compiled per-input resources identical to the frozen row. Headline values move from exact-map eps_F 7.409 percent, worst 1-F 6.18e-3, p [0.472,1.853] percent, anchor-only eps_t 3.55e-4 to circuit-level eps_F 7.399 percent, worst 1-F 6.20e-3, p [0.475,1.849] percent, measured map-level eps_t 8.07e-4 (eps_t_kind full_circuit_map_measured). The frozen breadth.csv row is unchanged and remains the exact-map record; the paper breadth-table 2D row and the DV-comparison 2D fidelity gap now read from breadth_2d_circuit.csv.

The breadth table, the classical DV quadrature table, and the DV circuit inventory are extended from M <= 16 to M = 32 at the same shared operating point (make_m32_breadth.py, make_m32_dv_extension.py, make_m32_dv_circuit.py, run from workdir_m32/ with hash-checked seed copies; job-7 audit, 2026-07-21). Script-enforced gates: heat_d32 eps_F 1.4554096658944946% inside [0.8,5.0]%, p_min 5.266% >= 2%, per-input resource ledger exactly 386/196/1/31 (1q/cx/D/cD) per Trotter step and 38600/19600/100/3100 over 100 steps, eps_synth <= 1e-12, wiring crosscheck max 2.008e-12 against the 1e-8 bound; advdiff_d32 advisory eps_F 1.4706051714714284% inside [0.5,15]%, wiring max 4.849e-12, kappa(V) 2.6346e7, Henrici 0.3884; DV quadrature M=4 rows reproduce the published table digit-for-digit before the M=32 rows are written, then M_DV 352 inside [350,370] and m_c 9 for both rows; DV circuit M=4 reproduces slice 53/38/9, full 5561/3896/900, and depth 9227, then M=32 gives LCU width 9, slice CRZ 9, PREP+unPREP 261/96/0 (measured slice 1127/758/9, full100 112961/75896/900, depth est 129317, slice-CX probe delta 0). M=8/16 row continuity was checked in the job-7 audit record, not by the scripts. The paper reads the two breadth-table M=32 rows, the two tab:dv_resource_compare M=32 rows (gap column combines one_minus_F_DV 5.00e-3/4.10e-3 with the basis-1 circuit-level infidelities 1.968e-4/1.926e-4 from breadth_m32.csv), the tab:dv_circuit_compare M=32 column, and the hybrid 38600/19600/100/3100 ledger sentence from these artifacts. Artifacts were promoted byte-identical from workdir_m32/results_revision/ to results_revision_v2/ (evidence hashes are the promoted working-tree bytes; CSV line endings are CRLF on disk and LF in git blobs under text=auto). This entry postdates generation: make_m32_dv_circuit.py's output path was subsequently made working-directory-relative, so meta-recorded source hashes refer to the generation-time scripts in git history.
